title: Lesha` #3962
definition:
Lasha = "fissure"

 1) a place in the southeast of Palestine at the limit of the
    Canaanites territory, near Sodom and Gomorrah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Lasha = "fissure"

 1) a place in the southeast of Palestine at the limit of the
    Canaanites territory, near Sodom and Gomorrah

    NASB:  a place on the boundary of Canaan
